name: AI Sales Automation
tagline: Accelerate your pipeline from lead to close with AI-driven sales ops
description: Full-cycle sales automation platform with four AI agents managing lead qualification, proposal generation, pipeline tracking, and follow-up sequencing. Integrates with your CRM, project management, email, and payment systems to create a seamless revenue engine. Scores leads in real-time, generates tailored proposals, and automates multi-touch follow-up campaigns.
prerequisites: CRM with API access (or customer spreadsheet for migration)
Historical sales data for lead scoring model training
